title: Ouyang Long
content:
Ouyang Long 
is an elder of the 
Treasured Jade Sect
.

History
[
]

He met 
Wang Lin
 when the latter had just entered 
Peng Lai
. Wang Lin saw him trading celestial jades for origin crystals so he approached him to do business. In fact, Ouyang Long was just a proxy for his Uncle-Master, 
Master Ashen Pine
.

He also invited Wang Lin to Master Ashen Pine's private auction on the latter's behalf.
